note: The Producer is voiced by the browser's Web Speech API (speechSynthesis), never ElevenLabs — its flat synthetic delivery is the character. Placeholders in curly braces are filled at runtime, which is exactly what pre-generated audio can't do. Every line is also rendered as text for captions.

lines.template: Round {round} complete. Advancing. Difficulty parameters increased.
Consecutive correct answers: {streak}. Statistical anomaly noted.
Warning. Lives remaining: one. Insurance status: not applicable.
Broadcast concluded. Final score: {score}. Rounds survived: {round}. Thank you for your participation.
Tonight's broadcast, {date}. All contestants receive identical questions. Synchronization: engaged.
Archive item recovered. Cataloging. Tape {tapeNumber} of {tapeTotal}.
Achievement unlocked: {achievementName}. Adding to permanent record.
Broadcast concluded. Final score: {score}. Archive annotation: Vernon would have liked this one.
